expected_architecture_principles.title: SQLite First
expected_architecture_principles.content: Use SQLite for simplicity and local-first approach

expected_architecture_principles.title: Derived State
expected_architecture_principles.content: State is derived from events through reducers

expected_architecture_principles.title: Measure First
expected_architecture_principles.content: Every cognitive layer has measurement and evaluation

expected_project_invariants.title: Events Are Truth
expected_project_invariants.content: Events are the immutable source of truth for all state

expected_project_invariants.title: Knowledge Is Derived
expected_project_invariants.content: Knowledge is derived state, never primary state

expected_project_invariants.title: 100% Provenance
expected_project_invariants.content: All knowledge must be traceable to source events

expected_project_invariants.title: No Orphan Memories
expected_project_invariants.content: Every memory must have source event IDs

expected_lessons.title: Deterministic Synthesis
expected_lessons.content: Same input must produce same knowledge output for reproducibility

expected_workflow_patterns.title: Event-Sourced Projection
expected_workflow_patterns.content: Events to Memories to Knowledge is the canonical pipeline

expected_decision_lineages.title: Decision Lineage: Database Choice
expected_decision_lineages.content: Decision: Use SQLite for local-first simplicity and reliability

expected_decision_lineages.title: Decision Lineage: Memory Provider
expected_decision_lineages.content: Decision: Markdown provider for human readability and version control

metadata.description: Real-world benchmark from Relay's own development history (Sprints A-I4)
